**输出:** 7

**解释:**

| `(1, 1)` | 向下移动 | `(2, 1)` | `5 + 4 = 9` |

到达右下角单元格的最小成本是 9。

 

**提示:**

- `2 <= m, n <= 80`
- `m == grid.length`
- `n == grid[i].length`

class PriorityQueue {
    private heap: [number, number, number, number][]; // [cost, i, j, t]
    constructor() {
        this.heap = [];
    }
    push(cost: number, i: number, j: number, t: number) {

        this.heapifyUp(this.heap.length - 1);
    }
    pop(): [number, number, number, number] | null {
        if (this.heap.length === 0) return null;
        const top = this.heap[0];
        this.heap[0] = this.heap[this.heap.length - 1];
        this.heap.pop();
        this.heapifyDown(0);
        return top;
    }
    private heapifyUp(index: number) {
        let parent = Math.floor((index - 1) / 2);
        while (index > 0 && this.heap[index][0] < this.heap[parent][0]) {
            [this.heap[index], this.heap[parent]] = [this.heap[parent], this.heap[index]];
            index = parent;
            parent = Math.floor((index - 1) / 2);
        }
    }
    private heapifyDown(index: number) {
        let smallest = index;
        const left = 2 * index + 1;
        const right = 2 * index + 2;
        if (left < this.heap.length && this.heap[left][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) {
            smallest = left;
        }
        if (right < this.heap.length && this.heap[right][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) {
            smallest = right;
        }
        if (smallest !== index) {
            [this.heap[index], this.heap[smallest]] = [this.heap[smallest], this.heap[index]];
            this.heapifyDown(smallest);
        }
    }
    isEmpty(): boolean {
        return this.heap.length === 0;
    }

function solve(grid: number[][], k: number): number {
    const m = grid.length;
    const n = grid[0].length;

    // Preprocess teleportTo
    const teleportTo = new Array(m).fill(null).map(() => new Array(n).fill(null).map(() => []));
    for (let i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
            for (let x = 0; x < m; x++) {
                for (let y = 0; y < n; y++) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {
                        teleportTo[i][j].push([x, y]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Dijkstra's algorithm
    const dist = new Array(m).fill(null).map(() => new Array(n).fill(null).map(() => new Array(k+1).fill(Infinity)));
    dist[0][0][0] = 0;

    // Priority queue: [cost, t, i, j]
    const pq = new PriorityQueue();
    pq.enqueue(0, 0, 0, 0);

    while (!pq.isEmpty()) {
        const [cost, t, i, j] = pq.dequeue();
        if (i === m-1 && j === n-1) {
            return cost;
        }
        if (cost > dist[i][j][t]) {
            continue;
        }

        // Regular moves: right and down
        if (j + 1 < n) {
            const newCost = cost + grid[i][j+1];
            if (newCost < dist[i][j+1][t]) {
                dist[i][j+1][t] = newCost;
                pq.enqueue(newCost, t, i, j+1);
            }
        }
        if (i + 1 < m) {
            const newCost = cost + grid[i+1][j];
            if (newCost < dist[i+1][j][t]) {
                dist[i+1][j][t] = newCost;
                pq.enqueue(newCost, t, i+1, j);
            }
        }

        // Teleportation moves
        for (const [x, y] of teleportTo[i][j]) {
            if (t < k) {
                const new_t = t + 1;
                if (cost < dist[x][y][new_t]) {
                    dist[x][y][new_t] = cost;
                    pq.enqueue(cost, new_t, x, y);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // If not found (should not happen)
    return -1;
}

class PriorityQueue {
    private heap: [number, number, number, number][]; // [cost, t, i, j]

    constructor() {
        this.heap = [];
    }

    enqueue(cost: number, t: number, i: number, j: number): void {
        this.heap.push([cost, t, i, j]);
        this.heapifyUp(this.heap.length - 1);
    }

    dequeue(): [number, number, number, number] | null {
        if (this.heap.length === 0) return null;
        const result = this.heap[0];
        this.heap[0] = this.heap[this.heap.length - 1];
        this.heap.pop();
        this.heapifyDown(0);
        return result;
    }

    isEmpty(): boolean {
        return this.heap.length === 0;
    }

    private heapifyUp(index: number): void {
        while (index > 0) {
            const parentIndex = Math.floor((index - 1) / 2);
            if (this.heap[index][0] >= this.heap[parentIndex][0]) {
                // Swap
                [this.heap[index], this.heap[parentIndex]] = [this.heap[parentIndex], this.heap[index]];
                index = parentIndex;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    private heapifyDown(index: number): void {
        const n = this.heap.length;
        while (index < n) {
            const left = 2 * index + 1;
            const right = 2 * index + 2;
            let smallest = index;
            if (left < n && this.heap[left][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) {
                smallest = left;
            }
            if (right < n && this.heap[right][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) {
                smallest = right;
            }
            if (smallest !== index) {
                [this.heap[index], this.heap[smallest]] = [this.heap[smallest], this.heap[index]];
                index = smallest;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

class PriorityQueue {
    private heap: [number, number, number, number][]; // [cost, t, i, j]

    constructor() {
        this.heap = [];
    }

    enqueue(cost: number, t: number, i: number, j: number): void {
        this.heap.push([cost, t, i, j]);
        this.heapifyUp(this.heap.length - 1);
    }

    dequeue(): [number, number, number, number] | null {
        if (this.heap.length === 0) return null;
        const result = this.heap[0];
        this.heap[0] = this.heap[this.heap.length - 1];
        this.heap.pop();
        this.heapifyDown(0);
        return result;
    }

    isEmpty(): boolean {
        return this.heap.length === 0;
    }

    private heapifyUp(index: number): void {
        while (index > 0) {
            const parentIndex = Math.floor((index - 1) / 2);
            if (this.heap[index][0] >= this.heap[parentIndex][0]) {
                // Swap
                [this.heap[index], this.heap[parentIndex]] = [this.heap[parentIndex], this.heap[index]];
                index = parentIndex;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    private heapifyDown(index: number): void {
        const n = this.heap.length;
        while (index < n) {
            const left = 2 * index + 1;
            const right = 2 * index + 2;
            let smallest = index;
            if (left < n && this.heap[left][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) {
                smallest = left;
            }
            if (right < n && this.heap[right][0] < this.heap[smallest][0]) {
                smallest = right;
            }
            if (smallest !== index) {
                [this.heap[index], this.heap[smallest]] = [this.heap[smallest], this.heap[index]];
                index = smallest;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size

  teleport = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n) { [] } }
  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n

      for x in 0...m
        for y in 0...n
          if grid[x][y] <= val
            teleport[i][j] << [x, y]
        end
      end
    end
  end

  # Initialize distance array
  dist = Array.new(m) { Array.new(n) { Array.new(k+1, Float::INFINITY) } }
  dist[0][0][0] = 0

  # Priority queue: [cost, i, j, t_used]
  pq = [[0, 0, 0, 0]]
  while pq.length > 0
    # Pop the smallest cost
    pq.sort! # Sort the array
    current = pq.shift
    cost, i, j, t = current[0], current[1], current[2], current[3]

    # Check if we reached the destination
    if i == m-1 && j == n-1
      return cost
    end

    # If current cost is higher than the recorded distance, skip
    if cost > dist[i][j][t]
      next
    end

    # Regular moves
    # Right
    if j+1 < n
      new_cost = cost + grid[i][j+1]
      if new_cost < dist[i][j+1][t]
        dist[i][j+1][t] = new_cost
        pq << [new_cost, i, j+1, t]
      end
    end
    # Down
    if i+1 < m
      new_cost = cost + grid[i+1][j]
      if new_cost < dist[i+1][j][t]
        dist[i+1][j][t] = new_cost
        pq << [new_cost, i+1, j, t]
      end

    # Teleport moves

        if new_cost < dist[x][y][new_t]
          dist[x][y][new_t] = new_cost
          pq << [new_cost, x, y, new_t]
        end
      end
    end
  end

  # If not found (should not happen)
  return dist[m-1][n-1][k]
end
